# Pull Request

## Change type

- [ ] Canon update
- [ ] Quick-reference update
- [ ] AI workflow update
- [ ] Planning update
- [ ] Story draft / non-canon development
- [ ] Archive review
- [ ] Canon promotion
- [ ] Maintenance / formatting only

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Canon impact

Choose one:

- [ ] No canon impact.
- [ ] Clarifies existing canon without changing it.
- [ ] Changes active canon.
- [ ] Promotes draft/planning material into canon.
- [ ] Moves or removes obsolete/non-active material.

Explain the impact:

## Files checked

Use the smallest sufficient context pack from `ai-workflows/CONTEXT_PACKS.md`.

Common foundation:

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `CANON_INDEX.md`
- [ ] `MANIFEST.md`
- [ ] `ACCESSIBILITY.md`
- [ ] `quick-reference/QUICK_START.md`
- [ ] `quick-reference/CANON_LOCKS.md`
- [ ] `quick-reference/RECENT_CHANGES.md`

Topic-specific checks:

- [ ] Relevant quick-reference files.
- [ ] Relevant numbered canon files.
- [ ] Relevant planning files.
- [ ] `ai-workflows/CONTEXT_PACKS.md`
- [ ] `ai-workflows/CONTINUITY_AUDIT.md`
- [ ] `ai-workflows/CANON_PROMOTION.md` when promoting canon.

## Rebuild safety

- [ ] Does not revive old plots, chronology, scene blocking, one-off incidents, or old prose by accident.
- [ ] Does not contradict current station layout.
- [ ] Does not override Arrival Control or clean/restricted routing by accident.
- [ ] Does not override Flight Control authority by accident.
- [ ] Does not treat nonlethal force, disabling, weapons, transport, cannabis, or public communication as consequence-free.
- [ ] Does not flatten character roles or make competent people stupid for comedy.
- [ ] Does not turn staff privacy, grief, Medical detail, labor concerns, or active investigations into public content.
- [ ] Maintains screen-reader-friendly Markdown.

## Station, mechanics, and authority checks

Complete when relevant:

- [ ] Scene or rule knows its level, route class, public/restricted status, and operational owner.
- [ ] Bubble elevators are limited to public atrium levels.
- [ ] Starship Garage and Restricted Works remain separate.
- [ ] The Green Room / Grünraum rules are preserved.
- [ ] The Spare Tap remains staff-only.
- [ ] Governance, labor, law, media, economy, and privacy consequences remain reviewable.
